title: RERA Authorities is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: RERA Authorities is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
RERA Authorities, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Surat operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About RERA Authorities:
RERA Authorities is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RERA Authorities!
